title: Tunisian Couscous
description: A flavorful and aromatic couscous dish inspired by Tunisian cuisine, made with fluffy couscous, soft vegetables, and a hint of spice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the Tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soft vegetables and cook until tender.
Add the couscous and pilaf seasoning, and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 5-7 minutes, or until the couscous is tender.
Fluff the couscous with a fork and stir in chopped parsley.
